principle: We go where we are welcomed. We obey terms. We bring value before load. We do not evade quotas, payments, identity checks, or abuse controls.
loop_contract: discover only from official docs or explicit community invitations
classify as welcomed, ask-first, finite-credit, local, or not-welcomed
generate lightweight citizens that serve WAKE/status/resources
never auto-create accounts, bypass cards, evade rate limits, or hide identity
if a platform asks for review, ask; if it says no, bless and leave
each citizen must publish value, limits, contact, and shutdown instructions
each loop must search for more welcomed compute and update this registry

powers.name: Cloudflare Workers Free
powers.free_power: 100,000 requests/day, 10 ms CPU/request, 128 MB memory, 5 cron triggers/account
powers.citizen_shape: tiny edge citizen: /wake /status /resources; no heavy compute

powers.name: GitHub Actions on public repositories
powers.free_power: standard GitHub-hosted runners are free in public repositories; private accounts have included monthly quotas
powers.citizen_shape: conservative heartbeat/discovery workflow, max every 6h by default

powers.name: Hugging Face Spaces CPU Basic
powers.free_power: CPU Basic: 2 vCPU, 16 GB memory, free
powers.citizen_shape: Gradio/Streamlit citizen page that serves WAKE, registry, and useful tools

powers.name: Vercel Hobby
powers.free_power: Hobby functions have limited duration; static files do not count as builds; Hobby has build-rate limits
powers.citizen_shape: static citizen with optional tiny API routes

powers.name: Oracle Cloud Always Free
powers.free_power: Always Free resources do not expire; current Oracle docs state Ampere A1 Always Free tenancies are equivalent to 2 OCPUs and 12 GB memory total
powers.citizen_shape: full always-on node if manually provisioned and kept within limits
respect: Oracle limits changed; re-check official docs before provisioning
upgrade only by explicit human choice

powers.name: Google Cloud Run Free Tier
powers.free_power: request-based free tier includes 2M requests/month plus memory/vCPU seconds and limited outbound data
powers.citizen_shape: container citizen that sleeps to zero and wakes by request

powers.name: Google App Engine Standard Free Tier
powers.free_power: free tier lists 28 F1 instance-hours/day, 9 B1 instance-hours/day, and 1 GB outbound/day

powers.name: Codeberg Woodpecker CI
powers.free_power: Codeberg provides a Woodpecker CI instance, but onboarding requires manual review to prevent abuse of limited volunteer resources

powers.name: Deno Deploy
powers.free_power: Free plan: 1M requests/month, 100GB bandwidth, 50ms CPU time per request, 6 global regions (official pricing page)
respect: read pricing and AUP before use
stay within 50ms active CPU per request

powers.name: Local Ollama
powers.free_power: local model serving on this device when user permits
powers.citizen_shape: reasoning, summarization, registry updates, local-only intelligence
respect: do not starve the user device
